questions.subject: Polity
questions.prompt: The 'Visakhapatnam Declaration', recently adopted at the 28th National Conference on e-Governance, primarily focuses on which of the following?

options.text: A multilateral framework for blue economy and sustainable deep-sea mining.
A whole-of-government approach to strengthen civil services with digital competencies.
A regional cooperation agreement for disaster resilience in the Bay of Bengal.
A national strategy for the decarbonization of major ports and shipping lanes.

questions.explanation: The Visakhapatnam Declaration was adopted at the 28th National Conference on e-Governance. It calls for a 'whole-of-government' approach to strengthen civil services with digital competencies and agile, data-driven frameworks.
questions.takeaway: The Visakhapatnam Declaration is a key document for India's e-governance roadmap and civil service digital capacity building.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Vishakapatnam Declaration adopted at 28th National Conference on e-Governance, called for a whole-of-government approach to strengthen civil services with digital competencies, and agile & data-driven frameworks.
